input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.3.4.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.3.4.3
            TITLE: when led lights are used without a diffuser, they must not be more than 20 mm apart.

            CONTENT:
            rule T.3.4.3: When LED lights are used without a diffuser, they must not be more than 20 mm apart.
T.3.4.3 When LED lights are used without a diffuser, they must not be more than 20 mm apart.

final_answer: When LED lights are used without a diffuser, they must not be more than 20 mm apart.
